name: Clock
description: Display a live digital clock on any Stream Deck button, updating every second. Renders directly onto the button face — no title required.
features: Clean style: sharp, minimal digits on a solid background
Sketchy style: hand-drawn look with a thick coloured border
Optional date display (abbreviated weekday + day + month)
Configurable time and date text colours
Updates every second via background polling
Lightweight — no credentials or network access required
